name: vLLM CUDA OpenAI Server
description: Run a Hugging Face model through vLLM's OpenAI-compatible API on local hardware.
notes: Best for the main model when you have enough VRAM.
The model id should be a Hugging Face model reference visible to the container.
Rasputin models should point at http://host.docker.internal:8000/v1 when the wrapper itself runs in Docker.
